items.title: [正面] I just transferred my data from my phone to steam,...
items.summary: I just transferred my data from my phone to steam, overall really fun game in MY opinion. Don't have much to say about it. If you prefer story over gameplay, might not suggest currently.

items.title: [正面] The story in the first chapter was good! The begin...
items.summary:
The story in the first chapter was good! The beginning definitely captivated me, there are great pictures that accompany the reading of the story.
But after that it slowly subsided,
and I was more interested in trying out PvP.

I particularly like the turn based PvP, it's basically a lot of fun, it's just unbalanced because there are rare cards which means certain players have access to more options & opportunities than others. Which makes it very, difficult to keep up. Without losing the fun of it.

Gets a fair amount of Gatcha attempts!
Gatcha Trials give you access to more characters, giving you a lot more options! 
(not all limited, has to wait for the corresponding event)

Well, solid game if you stick with it and save for limited characters or invest in it, you definitely have more chances in PvP.

as it is not just a cosmetic benefit aka. Skins means the player actually has a gaming advantage.
It pretty much takes away my drive to play.
